case_title: ALLPRO MECHANICX VS BROEDER, MANAMI et al

docket_entries.description: COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT TRAX AUTO 28723

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,725.00 FILED BY ALLPRO MECHANICX AS TO DEFENDANT BROEDER, MANAMI TRAX AUTO 28723 FOLSOM AUTO HASIM, HASIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLPRO MECHANICX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASIM, HASIC $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00, DEFENDANT TO ARRANGE TO PICK UP CAR FROM PLAINTIFF BY 10/22/99. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAX AUTO 28723

PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE DENIED.
